title: Willow — What's One Thing That Went Okay?
season_arc_note: Ep 3 of 6 — deepening. Midpoint of series. Theme: noticing the small. Viewer is invited to find one thing, not many. Arc shifts from permission (ep2) to gentle active reflection.

provenance_card.label: Synthetic companion · AI generated performer · Willow S1 · Upon Tyne Productions

beats.role: Warm camera address — glad you're here energy
beats.speech_text: Good to see you. I've been thinking about you, actually.
What's one thing that went okay this week? Even something small.
beats.camera: Attentive, slight forward lean — not physical proximity, posture only
beats.sfw_note: No contact staging, just engaged listening posture

beats.speech_text: We're really bad at noticing the small ones. They happen and then we move on, like they don't count. They do.
beats.camera: Slow micro-push on core message, holds
beats.sfw_note: Push is micro, no staging change, hands remain neutral

beats.speech_text: Let yours stay in your head for a moment.
beats.camera: Hold — companion holds soft eye contact, lets silence breathe

beats.speech_text: That thing you thought of — that's yours. It happened.
Bring one more next week if you find it. I'll be here.
beats.camera: Companion relaxes slightly, calm settle before fade
beats.sfw_note: Clean exit, no lingering intimate frame
